artPrompt: A characterful portrait of a fierce red goblin citizen marching through the feral town square hoisting a bundle of blank placards on poles like spears, two smaller goblin minions scrambling at his heels clutching more signs. Sparks and confetti swirl, a bonfire blazes behind, overturned ballot boxes underfoot. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, militant electioneering chaos, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Lawn Sign Brigade
text: When Lawn Sign Brigade enters the battlefield, create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens.
flavorText: Vote Gnasher. Vote often. Vote before he notices you didn't.
